creator: stefankueck@online.de
text:
Same problem for me. Compilation completed but installation failed due 
missing scheam.gecko... files.

Deleting the lines in Makefile with "GLIB_SCHEMAS= ....." solve the problem.

Best regards

Stefan

stefan@BiXi:/home/stefan % uname -a
FreeBSD BiXi.Manteuffel 10.0-STABLE FreeBSD 10.0-STABLE #0: Thu Mar 13 
21:29:54 CET 2014     root@BiXi.Manteuffel:/tmp/usr/src/sys/BiXi  amd64
